name: Data Security Posture Management
businessValue: Unifies DLP, Insider Risk and sensitivity-label signals into a single posture view with prioritized recommendations.
notes: Included with Microsoft 365 E5 via the underlying Purview DLP, Insider Risk Management and Information Protection workloads. Not listed in the M365 Maps matrix — added here so the UI surfaces it.

name: DSPM for AI
businessValue: Surfaces sensitive-data exposure in Copilot, Entra-registered AI apps and consumer GenAI; drives policy to block or label risky prompts.
notes: Same underlying Purview workloads as DSPM, scoped to generative AI interactions. Included with Microsoft 365 E5. Not listed in the M365 Maps matrix.

name: Information Protection Client
businessValue: Right-click classification in File Explorer/Office and bulk on-prem file scanning for sensitivity labels on Windows endpoints and file shares.
notes: Microsoft Purview Information Protection client for Windows (formerly the AIP unified labeling client / scanner). Bundled with any Information Protection entitlement (M365 E3 and up). Not enumerated in the M365 Maps matrix.

name: Microsoft Stream
businessValue: Stores and streams corporate video alongside other documents in SharePoint/OneDrive with permissions, search and transcript indexing.
notes: Modern Stream stores videos in SharePoint Online / OneDrive for Business and is included with any plan that grants SharePoint Online Plan 2 (E3 and up). Not enumerated in the M365 Maps matrix.

name: Shifts
businessValue: Lets managers build schedules and lets staff swap shifts, request time off and clock in/out from Teams.
notes: Included with any Microsoft Teams licence (E3/E5/E7). Not enumerated as a separate row in the M365 Maps matrix.

name: App-V
businessValue: Streams legacy Win32 apps to managed endpoints without local install, easing app conflicts during Windows migrations.
notes: Microsoft Application Virtualization (MDOP). Granted via Windows 11 Enterprise rights in M365 E3 and up. Microsoft positions Azure Virtual Desktop / Windows 365 / MSIX App Attach as the modern replacement; App-V mainstream support has ended but it is still licensed and runs on Windows 11.

name: AGPM
businessValue: Versions, approves and rolls back Group Policy changes with role-based delegation.
notes: Advanced Group Policy Management (MDOP). Granted via Windows 11 Enterprise rights in M365 E3 and up. Largely superseded by Intune configuration policies; no longer actively developed.

name: MBAM
businessValue: Centralised BitLocker key escrow, compliance reporting and recovery for fleets of Windows endpoints.
notes: Microsoft BitLocker Administration and Monitoring (MDOP). Granted via Windows 11 Enterprise rights in M365 E3 and up. Microsoft recommends moving to Intune (cloud) or Configuration Manager (on-prem) BitLocker management; MBAM is in extended support only.

name: UE-V
businessValue: Synchronises Windows and Office app settings across the user's PCs so the desktop follows them between machines.
notes: User Experience Virtualization (MDOP). Granted via Windows 11 Enterprise rights in M365 E3 and up. Largely superseded by Enterprise State Roaming (Entra ID) and OneDrive Known Folder Move.

name: SharePoint Premium
businessValue: Adds document processing, autofill columns, translation, eSignature, advanced management and Brand Center on top of SharePoint Online.
notes: Umbrella brand for Microsoft's premium SharePoint capabilities. Includes the matrix's 'SharePoint Advanced Management Plan 1' row plus the former Syntex document understanding, image tagging, translation and eSignature services. Sold per-user or via pay-as-you-go on top of SharePoint Online Plan 2.

name: Microsoft Sentinel (SIEM)
businessValue: Ingests logs from Azure, M365, on-prem and third parties, runs detection analytics and feeds correlated incidents into Defender XDR.
notes: Billed via Azure consumption (data ingestion & retention). M365 E5 customers receive the Sentinel Benefit — 5 MB/user/day of free ingestion. Not licensed per-user.

name: Microsoft Sentinel (SOAR)
businessValue: Runs Logic Apps playbooks and automation rules to triage, enrich and respond to incidents end-to-end.
notes: Same Sentinel workspace as the SIEM capability; SOAR features (playbooks, automation rules, Workbooks) are billed through underlying Azure Logic Apps consumption rather than a per-user M365 licence.

name: Microsoft Sentinel
businessValue: Single workspace combining SIEM analytics, threat intelligence and SOAR playbooks across Microsoft and third-party signals.
notes: Azure-consumption billed. M365 E5 includes the Sentinel Benefit (5 MB/user/day free ingestion of Microsoft 365 logs).

name: Defender for Cloud
businessValue: Continuous security assessment, posture recommendations and runtime workload protection across Azure, AWS, GCP and on-prem servers.
notes: Azure-billed (pay-as-you-go) across CSPM, Defender CSPM and workload plans (Servers, SQL, Storage, Containers, App Service, Key Vault, etc.). Not licensed per M365 user.

name: Defender for Servers
businessValue: Bundles MDE for servers, vulnerability assessment, file integrity monitoring and adaptive application controls; a common discussion-opener for what you run on Windows/Linux servers today.
notes: Defender for Cloud workload plan billed per server-hour (Plan 1 or Plan 2). Plan 2 includes Microsoft Defender for Endpoint for Servers, regulatory compliance dashboards and just-in-time VM access. Not in any M365 per-user SKU.
